variables.notes: No depreciation or amortisation row related to COGS appears in the provided income statement excerpt. With no explicit same-level separate D&A line above the truncation point, treat D&A as already embedded in the selected COGS bucket or not separately identifiable; add nothing to avoid double counting.

No SG&A-related depreciation or amortisation row appears in the provided income statement excerpt. The excerpt is truncated before any operating expense detail such as salaries/other operating expenses, so no separate D&A row can be identified for later addition. Use no separate XSGA D&A row to avoid double counting.
